title: Classic Improvements ADD-ON 3 Sand overlays
description: This add-on for Classic improvements adds overlays for both sand types and gravel
body:
# Classic Improvements Add-on 3

### If your looking for Classic improvements [here!](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/classicimprovements)

***This add-on adds overlays for***

+ Sand 

+ Red sand

+  gravel 

## **NOTES**

**THIS GO'S ABOVE CLASSIC IMPROVEMENTS AND ABOVE THE FIRST ADD-ON THE 3RD ONE CAN GO BELOW OR ABOVE IT**

**This requires Optifine or Continuity**

## LINKS

[OPTIFINE](https://optifine.net/downloads)

[CONTINUITY](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity)

Click the names to get linked to there websites
